user.title: Add a sportsground
user.description: Choose the Wollongong sportsground to monitor. Add the integration again to monitor another ground.

error.cannot_connect: Could not fetch the sportsgrounds list from Council. Check your connection and try again.
error.unknown: That sportsground is no longer listed. Reload and try again.

abort.already_configured: This sportsground is already being monitored.
